items.title: [负面] Morimens suena bien sobre el papel: Slay the Spire...
items.summary: Morimens suena bien sobre el papel: Slay the Spire + Londres victoriano + los Mitos de Cthulhu. El problema es que si le das la vuelta al papel también está escrito: estética anime con lolis + sistema de monetización gacha + no entender en absoluto lo que hace bueno a Slay the Spire. Una pena, la verdad.

items.title: [正面] Lovecraftian Victorian London with anime art. The ...
items.summary:
Lovecraftian Victorian London with anime art. The setting, worldbuilding, and vibes are immaculate, and the turn-based card strategy is really engaging. It is a gacha game, with all the expected trappings, but 35 hours in, and I haven't yet encountered a hard paywall. Not saying it isn't there, just that I have run into it yet.

But, a fair warning: The story is very much Lovecarft. And in this uncaring universe, there are far worse things than dying...

items.title: [负面] The PVP is fun, but too buggy and frustrating. Her...
items.summary:
The PVP is fun, but too buggy and frustrating. Here are the three strikes that led me to uninstall the game and leave a negative review;
1. I had equipped on my character a Wheel of Fate that would have revived her next turn after death. I inflicted enough poison and bleed stacks to finish all of the enemy characters at the end of their turn. They all died at turn end, but the match ended there and I did not revive. I received a loss, which should have been a victory.
2. The enemy inflicted enough stacks of bleed to kill my last remaining character after my turn, but I actively killed all four of them in that turn. The match SHOULD have ended there, but instead the bleed killed me. I received a loss, despite actively killing off my opponent while still alive.
3. A few matches later, the reverse to number 2 happened, and I had inflicted enough stacks of bleed and poison that would have killed all enemies at the end of their turn. They finished my last unit, but the match DID end and I received a loss. This would have been acceptable if number 2 hadn't screwed me over.

Ultimately, it was fun most of the time, but I was screwed over too many times to want to continue playing.
Also, in solo play you'll reach a point where you cannot progress unless you wait several days or pay them money, so that was the end of my journey.

items.title: [正面] great fun, lots of clicking. More a story game tha...
items.summary: great fun, lots of clicking. More a story game than anything

items.title: [正面] Great game, great rates and shop offers compared t...
items.summary:
Great game, great rates and shop offers compared to other Gachas, great Devs.

The biggest reason I chose to play this was because they announced that if the game were to ever get shutdown, they'd transition it to a permanent game so you can retain everything you obtained. I've lost thousands of dollars in other Gachas that got shutdown, so that plus good gameplay is enough reason for me to continue investing into Morimens.
